name: Stench
description: May terrify an attacking foe.

name: Thick Fat
description: Resistant to Fire- and Ice-type moves.

name: Rain Dish
description: Improves HP gain if it is raining.

name: Drizzle
description: Changes the weather to rainy.

name: Arena Trap
description: Immobilizes any attacker except Flying-type foes and those with Levitate.

name: Intimidate
description: Lowers the Physical Attack power of attackers.

name: Rock Head
description: Prevents damage from the recoil of moves such as Take Down.

name: Air Lock
description: Changes the weather to clear.

name: Hyper Cutter
description: Prevents Attack from being lowered.

name: Shadow Tag
description: Immobilizes attackers.

name: Speed Boost
description: The Pokémon's Movement Speed accelerates.

name: Battle Armor
description: Blocks critical hits.

name: Sturdy
description: Blocks one-hit KO moves.

name: Suction Cups
description: Prevents forced movement.

name: Clear Body
description: Prevents reduction of stats.

name: Torrent
description: Boosts the power of Water-type moves when HP is low.

name: Guts
description: Boosts Attack if the Pokémon has any status problems.

name: Rough Skin
description: Inflicts damage on attackers.

name: Shell Armor
description: Blocks critical hits.

name: Natural Cure
description: Recovers quickly from status problems.

name: Damp
description: Prevents any explosions on the dungeon floor.

name: Limber
description: Prevents paralysis.

name: Magnet Pull
description: Immobilizes Steel-type attackers.

name: White Smoke
description: Prevents reduction of stats.

name: Synchronize
description: Shares status problems with any Pokémon in reach.

name: Overgrow
description: Boosts the power of Grass-type moves when HP is low.

name: Swift Swim
description: Boosts attack frequency if it is raining.

name: Sand Stream
description: Changes the weather to a sandstorm.

name: Sand Veil
description: Boosts Evasion if there is a sandstorm.

name: Keen Eye
description: Prevents Accuracy from going down.

name: Inner Focus
description: Prevents cringing.

name: Static
description: Paralyzes attackers.

name: Shed Skin
description: Recovers easily from status problems.

name: Huge Power
description: Occasionally boosts Attack.

name: Volt Absorb
description: Restores HP if damaged by an Electric- type move.

name: Water Absorb
description: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.

name: Forecast
description: The Pokémon's type changes with the weather.

name: Serene Grace
description: Improves the chances of triggering the added effects of moves.

name: Poison Point
description: Poisons attackers.

name: Trace
description: Changes ability to that of the foe attacking or using a move.

name: Oblivious
description: Prevents infatuation.

name: Truant
description: Prevents action in your next turn after using a move or a Wonder Orb.

name: Run Away
description: Becomes terrified and flees when HP gets low. Leaders will resist this urge.

name: Sticky Hold
description: Prevents the Pokémon's hold item from being taken.

name: Cloud Nine
description: Changes the weather to clear.

name: Illuminate
description: If damaged, a wild Pokémon appears on the dungeon floor.

name: Early Bird
description: Awakens quickly from sleep.

name: Hustle
description: Boosts Attack but lowers Accuracy.

name: Drought
description: Changes the weather to sunny.

name: Lightningrod
description: Attracts Electric-type moves.

name: Compoundeyes
description: Boosts the Accuracy of moves.

name: Marvel Scale
description: Boosts Defense if there is a status problem.

name: Wonder Guard
description: Only super-effective moves can inflict damage.

name: Insomnia
description: Prevents sleep.

name: Levitate
description: Blocks all Ground-type moves.

name: Plus
description: Boosts Special Attack if there is a Pokémon with the Minus ability.

name: Pressure
description: If hit by a foe's move, the foe uses more PP than usual.

name: Liquid Ooze
description: Inflicts damage on the foe if hit by a move that drains HP.

name: Color Change
description: Changes the Pokémon's type to that of the move that hit it last.

name: Soundproof
description: Blocks the effects of all moves that use sound.

name: Effect Spore
description: Attackers are poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

name: Flame Body
description: Afflicts attackers with burns.

name: Minus
description: Boosts Special Attack if there is a Pokémon with the Plus ability.

name: Own Tempo
description: Prevents confusion.

name: Magma Armor
description: Prevents freezing.

name: Water Veil
description: Prevents burns.

name: Swarm
description: Boosts the power of Bug-type moves when HP is low.

name: Cute Charm
description: Causes attackers to become infatuated.

name: Immunity
description: Prevents becoming poisoned or badly poisoned.

name: Blaze
description: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves when HP is low.

name: Pickup
description: Finds items if the Pokémon is not holding anything.

name: Flash Fire
description: Zeroes damage from Fire-type move hits, and boosts own Fire moves.

name: Vital Spirit
description: Prevents sleep.

name: Chlorophyll
description: Boosts attack frequency if the weather is sunny.

name: Pure Power
description: Occasionally boosts Attack.

name: Shield Dust
description: Blocks the added effects of moves.
